ogTitle: Arthurs Seat vs Ascot: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arthurs Seat and Ascot.
heading: Arthurs Seat vs Ascot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arthurs Seat, Victoria and Ascot, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ascot has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Arthurs Seat (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arthurs Seat or Ascot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arthurs Seat has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Ascot scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arthurs Seat scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Ascot scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arthurs Seat or Ascot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ascot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
